code: import React,{useState}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Wallet(_ref){let{account,setAccount}=_ref;const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const connect=async()=>{try{setLoading(true);if(!window.ethereum){alert("MetaMask is not installed.
